title: RenderText
description: RenderText: Render text at a location and orientation in space with specified height, font and colour.

Cartesian.description: Cartesian to locate and orientate the text. Cartesian: A three-dimensional Cartesian coordinate system, as defined by a set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors and a common origin point

Height.description: Height of the text. Default is 1. Units will be determined by the setting of the user interface that renders the text.

FontName.description: Font used to render the text. Default is Arial.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
